heading: Permissible prepayment or voluntary termination and modification of commitments
label: 4114 Permissible prepayment or voluntary termination and modification of commitments

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary approves a plan of action under , but does not provide the assistance approved in such plan during the 15-month period beginning on the date of approval.section 4109(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: After the date that the housing would have been eligible for prepayment pursuant to the terms of the mortgage (notwithstanding this subchapter), the Secretary approves a plan of action under section 4110 or 4111 of this title, but does not provide the assistance approved in such plan before the earlier of (i) the expiration of the 2-month period beginning on the commencement of the 1st fiscal year beginning after such approval, or (ii) the expiration of the 6-month period beginning on the date of approval.

children.label: C
children.text: The Secretary approves a plan of action under section 4110 or 4111 of this title for any eligible low-income housing not covered by subparagraph (B), but does not provide the assistance approved in such plan before the earlier of (i) the expiration of the 2-month period beginning on the commencement of the 1st fiscal year beginning after such approval, or (ii) the expiration of the 9-month period beginning on the date of approval.

An owner who intended to transfer the housing to a qualified purchaser under section 4110 or 4111 of this title, and fully complied with the provisions of such section, did not receive any bona fide offers from any qualified purchasers within the applicable time periods.

children.heading: Modification of commitments
children.label: 1 Modification of commitments
children.text: Modify the binding commitments made pursuant to that are dependent on such rental assistance.section 4112(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Termination of plan of action
children.label: 2 Termination of plan of action
children.text: Permit the owner to prepay the mortgage and terminate the plan of action and any implementing use agreements or restrictions, but only if the owner agrees in writing to comply with provisions of .section 4113 of this title
